title: Review: feat(wallet): Sapling shielded tx builder (nie-wdw.7)
notes:
Maintainer risk: HIGH — P0 convergence bug will produce confusing builder errors on realistic multi-note transactions; P1 privacy bug (change address reuse) ships a privacy violation in a privacy coin
Confidence: 25% chance of a missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: (1) cannot test builder.build() without real 48MB Sapling params — the actual FeeRule enforcement behavior is assumed, not verified; (2) scanner not yet written — correctness of what bytes go into note_g_d/note_pk_d/note_rseed is unverifiable until the scanner lands. Would raise confidence if: (a) happy-path integration test with real params and a real note from a known seed, (b) scanner code reviewed alongside this diff.
close_reason: All P0/P1 bugs fixed. Good-decision records (nie-83e.7, nie-83e.8) force-closed with epic.
